properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 69/20
BARENTS SEA
THE NORWEGIAN AIRFORCE WILL CONDUCT AIRDROP OF CALIBRATION SPHERES IN BARENTS SEA ON THE 7 JUL 2020 FROM 0830 TO 1430 UTC.
TRAFFIC WITHIN THIS AREA MIGHT BE RELATED TO DANGER, AND VESSELS ARE REQUESTED TO STAY OUTSIDE THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES WITHIN THE ANNOUNCED TIMEFRAME:

1. DANGER AREA:
A. 70-43.0N  031-00.0E.
B. 71-06.0N  031-00.0E.
C. 71-06.0N  031-54.0E.
D. 70-36.0N  031-54.0E.
E. 70-36.0N  031-24.0E.

2. CANCEL THIS MESSAGE 071430 UTC JUL 20.
